events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missing weld per drawing on a structural welding job, rough-complete stage, with AWS D1.1 as reference. Missing weld is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.
